archive_confidence.note: confidence=1 means high volume, balanced sources, and multiple sources active. Use as analytic weight.

flag_reliability.note: usable as cross-sectional metric (see source-adjustment for time series)
SUPPRESSED: only 12 positives — insufficient for trend analysis

warnings: CRITICAL: gender_marker time series is ~100% explained by source-mix changes (neoexpresso GM=0.08%, netempregos GM=32.6%). Use source-adjusted rate instead.
remote_hint has only 12 positives — field is analytically absent.
cargadetrabalhos absent after 2020 — all post-2020 category distributions are affected by survivorship bias.
company_extracted missing in 82.6% of records (use clean count only).
seniority=mid is 80.0% of all records — seniority×anything cross-tabs have near-zero discriminatory power.

kpis.gender_marker_adjustment_note: Adjusted rate holds source mix constant at 2015-2019 baseline weights. Raw rate swings ±20pp due to archive composition, not market change.
kpis.remote_hint_note: remote_hint has 12 positives in 20,416 records — treated as absent, not as evidence of a zero-remote market.

time_series.gender_marker_note: rate_gender_marker_raw is unreliable as a time series. rate_gender_marker_adjusted (constant ~0.194) is the source-composition-corrected estimate of the true market rate.

cross_tabs.flag_correlations_note: remote_hint excluded (< 30 positives). seniority×location cross-tab suppressed: seniority=mid at 80.0% gives near-zero discriminatory power.

internship_economy.top2_concentration_note: The top 2 categories by intern_rate absorb 47.5% of all internship ads despite representing 16.0% of total volume.

gender_marker_analysis.methodology_note: The 'adjusted' rate answers: what would GM be if every year had the same source mix as 2015-2019? Answer: ~19.4% — essentially constant. Raw YoY changes in GM rate are ~100% source-mix artefact.
gender_marker_analysis.cross_sectional_note: by_category IS reliable: source mix is constant within any given year, so cross-category comparisons at the same point in time are valid.

weight_rationale.intern_rate × 3: Strongest precarity signal: unpaid/cheap labour dependency
weight_rationale.senior_rate × −2: Seniority as bargaining-power proxy (higher = less vulnerable)

remote_hint.reason: Only 12 positives — below minimum threshold of 30

market_structure.interpretation_note: HHI near 0 = highly diversified; near 1 = one category monopoly. Effective_categories = 1/HHI: interpretable as the number of equally-sized categories that would produce the same concentration.
